title: NHDTA-528 An elegant wife who is lustful while being told a dirty word by being filthy in a vulgar pose during lessons 2
overview: A filthy teacher who infiltrates into a lesson classroom where many married women gather. Pretending to be confused about the work, when approaching the targeted married woman, she steals the eyes of surrounding mom friends and suddenly approaches. A married woman who is blamed for a sudden event with a vulgar pose such as crawl on all fours, M-shaped spread legs, leg raising etc. without being able to defy the teacher. Then, while saying "Oma * koguchuguchu" and "Ochi * po feels good", he turns around.
